since_last: 33% of 100 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.08%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 33% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.01% · BTC +0.10% · Gold +0.94% · Nasdaq100 -1.49%. 33% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.08%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.08%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -3.02%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: ISRG is the standout at -14.15%
cards.body: Leaders: LEU +6.11%, ZS +2.40%, GEV +2.09%, CSCO +2.08%, ARM +1.98%. Laggards: ISRG -14.15%, CRNC -6.60%, PUBM -6.60%, AMAT -5.57%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.43% at $123.99
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.43% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: ISRG moving on no clear catalyst
cards.body: ISRG is -14.15% with no fresh headline this cycle — attention without a story. Volume, not news, is doing the work.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
